prompt: An aerial drone photograph of a sprawling, lush green university campus on a sunny day. In the foreground, a wide multi-lane road with cars passes through a large concrete entrance gate bearing the large white text "{argument name="university name" default="ODTÜ METÜ"}". To the right of the gate, two tall flagpoles fly a {argument name="flag 1" default="Turkish flag"} and a {argument name="flag 2" default="white flag with a red circular logo"}. The midground features a long rectangular reflecting pool surrounded by green lawns and pedestrian paths, flanked by various modernist concrete academic buildings. Notable structures include a cylindrical building with red and white horizontal stripes on the left and a large pyramid-shaped building on the right. In the background, a dense city skyline representing {argument name="city skyline" default="Ankara"} stretches across the horizon, featuring a prominent tall observation tower, backed by rolling hills and mountains under a clear blue sky with scattered white clouds.
translatedPrompt: 一张晴天下的广阔、绿意盎然的大学校园无人机航拍照片。前景中，一条宽阔的多车道公路上车辆穿行，经过一座巨大的混凝土入口大门，门上刻有醒目的白色文字“{argument name="university name" default="ODTÜ METÜ"}”。大门右侧有两根高耸的旗杆，分别悬挂着“{argument name="flag 1" default="土耳其国旗"}”和“{argument name="flag 2" default="带有红色圆形标志的白旗"}”。中景处设有一个长方形倒影池，周围环绕着草坪和人行道，两侧分布着各式现代主义风格的混凝土教学楼。显著建筑包括左侧一座带有红白水平条纹的圆柱形建筑，以及右侧一座巨大的金字塔形建筑。背景中，代表“{argument name="city skyline" default="安卡拉"}”的密集城市天际线在地平线上延伸，其中包含一座醒目的高大观景塔，远处是连绵起伏的丘陵和山脉，天空湛蓝，点缀着零星的白云。

breakdown.creativeCore: 大学校园航拍图：生成一张逼真的大学校园航拍照片，包含特定的建筑地标、入口大门以及远处的城市天际线。
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.bestUse: 直播带货界面、社交电商、移动端商品页

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a UI/界面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: horizontal]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
